mapper.select: SELECT building_id, building_name, unit_name, COUNT(*) AS household_count, COALESCE(SUM(build_area), 0) AS total_area FROM c_property_roster WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY building_id, building_name, unit_name ORDER BY building_name, unit_name

SELECT roster_id, tenant_id, community_name, building_id, building_name, unit_name, room_id, room_name, build_area, registered_owner_name, registered_owner_phone, status FROM c_property_roster WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY registered_owner_name, registered_owner_phone, building_name, unit_name, room_name
SELECT tenant_name FROM t_tenant_community WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} LIMIT 1

SELECT roster_id, tenant_id, community_name, building_id, building_name, unit_name, room_id, room_name, build_area, registered_owner_name, registered_owner_phone, status FROM c_property_roster WHERE roster_id = #{rosterId} LIMIT 1

SELECT GREATEST( COALESCE((SELECT MAX(building_id) FROM c_property_roster WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}), #{tenantId} * 1000), COALESCE((SELECT MAX(building_id) FROM c_owner_property WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}), #{tenantId} * 1000) ) + 1

SELECT GREATEST( COALESCE((SELECT MAX(room_id) FROM c_property_roster WHERE building_id = #{buildingId}), #{buildingId} * 1000), COALESCE((SELECT MAX(room_id) FROM c_owner_property WHERE building_id = #{buildingId}), #{buildingId} * 1000) ) + 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO c_property_roster ( tenant_id, community_name, building_id, building_name, unit_name, room_id, room_name, build_area, registered_owner_name, registered_owner_phone, import_batch_no, imported_by, status ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{communityName}, #{buildingId}, #{buildingName}, #{unitName}, #{roomId}, #{roomName}, #{buildArea}, #{registeredOwnerName}, #{registeredOwnerPhone}, #{importBatchNo}, #{importedBy}, 'ACTIVE' ) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, building_name, unit_name, room_name) DO UPDATE SET community_name = EXCLUDED.community_name, building_id = EXCLUDED.building_id, room_id = EXCLUDED.room_id, build_area = EXCLUDED.build_area, registered_owner_name = EXCLUDED.registered_owner_name, registered_owner_phone = EXCLUDED.registered_owner_phone, import_batch_no = EXCLUDED.import_batch_no, imported_by = EXCLUDED.imported_by, status = 'ACTIVE', update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO c_owner_property_claim ( account_id, uid, tenant_id, roster_id, building_id, building_name, unit_name, room_id, room_name, applicant_real_name, applicant_phone, roster_owner_name, roster_owner_phone, match_result, claim_status, is_joint_ownership, is_voting_delegate, proof_type, proof_material_json, bound_opid ) VALUES ( #{accountId}, #{uid}, #{tenantId}, #{rosterId}, #{buildingId}, #{buildingName}, #{unitName}, #{roomId}, #{roomName}, #{applicantRealName}, #{applicantPhone}, #{rosterOwnerName}, #{rosterOwnerPhone}, #{matchResult}, #{claimStatus}, #{jointOwnership}, #{votingDelegate}, #{proofType}, CAST(#{proofMaterialJson} AS jsonb), #{boundOpid} )
mapper.select: SELECT claim_id, account_id, uid, tenant_id, roster_id, building_id, building_name, unit_name, room_id, room_name, applicant_real_name, applicant_phone, roster_owner_name, roster_owner_phone, match_result, claim_status, is_joint_ownership, is_voting_delegate, proof_type, proof_material_json::text AS proof_material_json, reject_reason_code, reject_reason, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, bound_opid, create_time FROM c_owner_property_claim WHERE claim_id = #{claimId} LIMIT 1

SELECT claim_id, account_id, uid, tenant_id, roster_id, building_id, building_name, unit_name, room_id, room_name, applicant_real_name, applicant_phone, roster_owner_name, roster_owner_phone, match_result, claim_status, is_joint_ownership, is_voting_delegate, proof_type, proof_material_json::text AS proof_material_json, reject_reason_code, reject_reason, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, bound_opid, create_time FROM c_owner_property_claim WHERE uid = #{uid} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE c_owner_property SET account_status = 3, is_voting_delegate = 0, verify_status = 'SUPERSEDED', superseded_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, superseded_reason = #{reason}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND room_id = #{roomId} AND uid != #{uid} AND account_status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO c_owner_property ( uid, tenant_id, building_id, room_id, build_area, is_joint_ownership, is_voting_delegate, account_status, verify_type, verify_status, verify_source, verified_by, verified_at, update_time ) VALUES ( #{uid}, #{tenantId}, #{buildingId}, #{roomId}, #{buildArea}, #{jointOwnership}, #{votingDelegate}, 1, #{verifyType}, 'VERIFIED', #{verifySource}, #{verifiedBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, room_id, uid) DO UPDATE SET building_id = EXCLUDED.building_id, build_area = EXCLUDED.build_area, is_joint_ownership = EXCLUDED.is_joint_ownership, is_voting_delegate = EXCLUDED.is_voting_delegate, account_status = 1, verify_type = EXCLUDED.verify_type, verify_status = 'VERIFIED', verify_source = EXCLUDED.verify_source, verified_by = EXCLUDED.verified_by, verified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, superseded_at = NULL, superseded_reason = NULL, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE c_owner_property_claim SET claim_status = #{status}, bound_opid = #{opid}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE claim_id = #{claimId}

UPDATE c_owner_property_claim SET claim_status = 'REJECTED', reject_reason_code = #{rejectReasonCode}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE claim_id = #{claimId} AND claim_status = 'PENDING_VERIFY'
